name: staff-prijava
title: <:57656pinkarrow:1504506091751477319>  STAFF PRIJAVA
description:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Otvorene su prijave za **Staff tim** servera!

<:89292document:1504506160399650907> **Kako se prijaviti:**
<:114060numberone1pink:1500460043575885915>  Klikni redom na **5 dugmadi** ispod i upiši svoje podatke
<:617584numbertwo2pink:1500460055231860898>  Kad popuniš **sva polja**, klikni **<:98773announcepink:1504506163772002525> Pošalji prijavu**
<:923324numberthree3pink:1500460082222206988>  Bot će ti otvoriti **privatni kanal** sa staff timom

<:27825pinkpin:1504506059912511719> Tvoji odgovori se vide samo tebi dok ne pošalješ prijavu.
<:36298alertpink2:1504506072264741087> **Discord invite linkovi nisu dozvoljeni** u poljima!
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

name: private-vc
title: <:4755undeadened:1504505879750377542> Dobrodošao u svoj kanal, {user}!
description:
**Ti si vlasnik!** <:33379crownred:1504505536840859668> Koristi dugmad ispod:

<:3409locked:1504509321613148342> **Lock** — niko ne može ući
<:32673memberred:1504505534273949848> **Unlock** — svi mogu ući
<:50265trialmoderator:1504506932646510772> **Hide / Show** — sakrij/pokaži kanal
<:8526link:1504505939917803620> **Rename** — promijeni ime
<:7188members:1504505910314405888> **Limit** — postavi max članova
<:33570alert:1504509383537721514> **Kick** — izbaci nekog iz kanala
<:3652invite:1504505868832608427> **Owner** — prebaci vlasništvo
<:92042no:1504509438273523842> **Delete** — obriši kanal

*Kanal se automatski briše kad ostane prazan.*
